theme_and_archetype.description: Maintains authority and clarity via structured cards and a 12-column grid, while preserving the existing warm brand palette (coral, cream, navy).

layout_grid.wrapper_classes: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 mt-8 items-start

BentoAction.description: A refined, subtle action row. Fixes stray accent rings by only using the accent style when explicitly required (e.g., Quick Seal). Replaces heavy borders with transparent ones that appear on hover.
BentoAction.js_implementation: function BentoAction({ icon: Icon, label, desc, onClick, accent, ...props }) { return ( ); }

CommandCenter.description: Treats the 3 feature columns (Core Actions, AI Intelligence, Security & Identity) as one cohesive card with vertical dividers.
CommandCenter.grid: <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 divide-y md:divide-y-0 md:divide-x divide-slate-100">

NetworkAndTools.description: Replaces the flat grid with a properly contained card section.
NetworkAndTools.header: <CardHeader className="bg-slate-50/80 border-b border-slate-100 pb-4"><CardTitle className="text-xs font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-slate-600">Network & Tools</CardTitle></CardHeader>
NetworkAndTools.content: {/* BentoActions here */}

NotaryRequests.description: Wrap in standard Card component with a clear header.
NotaryRequests.header: <CardHeader className="bg-slate-50/80 border-b border-slate-100 pb-4 flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-coral-600" /><CardTitle className="text-xs font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-slate-600 !mt-0">My Notarization Requests</CardTitle></CardHeader>
NotaryRequests.content: {/* Request Rows here */}

RecentDocumentSeals.description: Wrap in standard Card component. Modernize empty state so it is slimmer and inline.
RecentDocumentSeals.header: <CardHeader className="bg-slate-50/80 border-b border-slate-100 pb-4"><CardTitle className="text-xs font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-slate-600">Recent Document Seals</CardTitle></CardHeader>
RecentDocumentSeals.empty_state_jsx:
No documents sealed yet

Secure your first document on the blockchain.

implementation_plan.high_level_jsx_structure:
1. Add CardHeader, CardTitle to the imports from shadcn UI.
2. Update `BentoAction` component definition to fix focus rings.
3. Make sure to remove any accent prop on BentoAction items where it shouldn't be primary.
4. Wrap the content after `<DashboardHero />` in `<div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 mt-8 items-start">`.
5. Create left column `<div className="lg:col-span-8 space-y-8">` containing the Command Center, Network & Tools, Notary Requests, and Recent Seals.
6. Create right column `<div className="lg:col-span-4 space-y-8">` containing the StatePickabilityWidget and ExpiryWidget.

micro_interactions.hover_states: Action rows shift background subtly, fade in a chevron with a tiny X-translation, and deepen icon colors.
micro_interactions.focus_states: Interactive elements should rely on clean focus-visible rings rather than permanent borders.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure no test IDs are removed. Use EXACT Tailwind classes from the component_updates sections. Maintain the core logic, simply restructure the JSX to reflect the 12-column grid and modern card wrappers. All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. DO NOT propose color/typography overhauls.
